title: THE FOUR OLDS — sc05b Pell's quota

beats.caption: INT. FEDERAL COMPLIANCE FIELD OFFICE - DAY

panel.gen: A cramped converted storefront office with folding tables and a space heater, fluorescent tubes overhead, a laminated motivational poster on the wall reading HARMONY IS A VERB above a small plaque photo. At a folding desk, the man from the attached reference sheet sits before an open laptop mid video call, matching his face exactly.

lines.text: [dry] A converted storefront. Folding tables, a space heater, a laminated poster on the wall: Harmony is a verb — above it, a photo plaque, Q3 Compliance Excellence Award, Pell two years younger holding it with both hands like a fish. He's at a folding desk, laptop open on a call. On the screen: Director Holloway, gray, unreadable, better light than this room has.
[bright, reading off a checklist, performing competence] Dawes parcel, closed this morning. Apparatus recovered, tagged federal interest. Full cooperation on-site. Well — cooperation.
[pushing, a little desperate] It's a significant one, sir. Fifty years of unlogged—

[cutting him off, not really listening, distracted by something else on his end] Ohio's regional is at six this week. You're regional too. Forty-one parcels flagged, one closure since binding. That's the number I'm reading right now, off a spreadsheet, with your name on the tab.
[quiet] Pell's smile holds a half-second too long.
[recovering, brisk] Understood. I'll accelerate the schedule.
[already moving on, bored] Accelerate it before the Fourth. I've got a call in nine minutes.
[flat] The screen goes to the call's end card before Pell can answer. He sits a moment, the dead laptop reflecting the fluorescent tubes overhead.

[slow] He pulls the district binder over, flips past Dawes, closed, and runs his finger down a long column of names. He stops on one, uncaps a highlighter, and drags it across the line, slow, hard enough to bleed through the page. [beat] He closes the binder. Squares it on the desk. Takes his lanyard off the hook by the door, and puts it back on.
